title: Time Conflict Request
content:
Time Conflict Request
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS. It explains how to request permission to register for courses with overlapping schedules.

IMPORTANT: Due to MHEC (Maryland Higher Education Commission) regulations, Morgan State cannot accept a time conflict exceeding 15 minutes. If you are a graduating senior or have extenuating circumstances, contact your department chair before completing this form.

---

STEP 1: ENTER YOUR NAME
Enter your full name.

---

STEP 2: ENTER ACADEMIC INFORMATION
Enter your major, classification, GPA, and probation status.

---

STEP 3: ENTER REGISTERED COURSE INFORMATION
Enter the details for the course you ARE already registered for:
- CRN (Course Reference Number)
- Course subject and number
- Meeting days
- Start and end time

You can find this information in Websis under the "REGISTRATION" tab > Schedule Detail.

---

STEP 4: ENTER CONFLICTING COURSE INFORMATION
Enter the details for the CONFLICTING course you want to add. Search for the course in the top section of the form.

---

STEP 5: ENTER INSTRUCTOR EMAIL
Enter the instructor's MSU email address. You can find instructor email addresses via Morgan's online directory.

---

STEP 6: ACKNOWLEDGE REGISTRATION DEADLINE
Your time conflict request must be approved before the add/drop deadline. Deadlines are published on the Academic Calendar. Any requests still in progress by the deadline will be automatically voided.

---

STEP 7: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes up to 10 business days. Both instructors and chairpersons must approve the request.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Time Conflict Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ka3UrzhH_tmvKbsl2KRwAJO58oEdhInw/view)
